case_title: MING WAI SIU VS. WAI HING HO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $95.00 SERVED MAR-06-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HO, WAI HING
REMARK:SC-112A PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ALONG WITH AN ENDORSED FILED COPY OF DISMISSAL AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO. ATTACHED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-01-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF MING WAI SIU IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSITED BY CARMEN LI, COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER. DEFENDANTS WAI HING HO AND ANNIE HO ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAI HING HO IS ASSITED BY FAMILY MEMBER GINA HO. GINA HO WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH FOR CANTONESE TRANSLATION. DEFENDANT ANNIE HO WAS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS A DEFENDANT DURING THE PROCEEDING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIU, MING WAI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HO, WAI HING STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
